artifact_summary: Screenshot of a Generator Faceplate displaying real-time telemetry for Generator No.1, including run time, start count, and three-phase electrical readings.
artifact_blurb: A detailed dashboard view of the Generator Faceplate for Generator No.1, providing live monitoring of operational metrics such as cumulative run time and start frequency, alongside critical electrical parameters including three-phase output current and voltage levels.
